query: SELECT code, name, priceHT, unit, category FROM bpu_items WHERE code IN ('R05','R12','R13','R14','R15','R16','R17','R18','R19','R20','R21','R22','R23','R24','ACC-01','ACC-02','ACC-03','ACC-04') ORDER BY code
